message:
refactor(mobile): Complete mobile UI redesign with clean bottom tab bar

- Rewrite mobile-overrides.css with mobile-first design principles
- Simplify ControlDeck to 5-button iOS/Android-style bottom tab bar
- Remove complex nested tabs and content areas from ControlDeck
- Clean CSS with proper breakpoints: 480px, 640px, 900px
- Add WCAG 2.5.5 compliant 44px+ touch targets
- Support safe area insets for notched devices
- Add landscape phone optimizations
- Remove conflicting mobile-landscape.css styles

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
